response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform development, instead demonstrating strong full-stack web and open-source contributions with TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief, non-dominant C++ exposure in early roles.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions and tooling development
Strong mentoring and workshop leadership in testing and architecture
Proven ability to deliver complex systems across diverse tech stacks
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks demonstrable cloud compute platform or distributed systems leadership
Minimal exposure to core technologies like AWS/GCP infrastructure or hardware-aware compute systems
